TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pakurung ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 106 buwan, 227 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 33%, Paywan 3%, Bunun 3%, Rukay 12%, Puyuma 7%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pakurung hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pakurung hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pakurung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pakurung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pakurung hya' ga Kasavakan. tay 'llaw na Pakurung hya' ga Kalaluran. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pakurung ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pakurung ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pakuruŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, rukaj **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kas~ɕa*akan. taj ʔllaw na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kalaluran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pakuruŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pakuruŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pakurung ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 106 buwan, 227 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 33%, Paywan 3%, Bunun 3%, Rukay 12%, Puyuma 7%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pakurung hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pakurung hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pakurung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pakurung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pakurung hya' ga Kasavakan. tay 'llaw na Pakurung hya' ga Kalaluran. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pakurung ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pakurung ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pakuruŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, rukaj **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kas~ɕa*akan. taj ʔllaw na pakuruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kalaluran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pakuruŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pakuruŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
